name: Roasted Pork Loin with Bacon and Onion Spaetz
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees.
2. For the pork loin: Season the entire loin with olive oil and salt. In a hot sauté pan, sear the loin for 1-2 minutes on each side. Remove from the pan and sprinkle the loin with cracked black pepper. Place in a roasting pan. Roast the loin for 25 to 30 minutes until medium-rare. Remove from the oven and let rest for 10 minutes.
3. For the spaetzle: In a hot large pan, render the bacon until crispy, then remove the bacon. In the bacon fat, sauté the onions for 2-3 minutes. Stir in the bacon. Season with salt and pepper. Remove the loin from the pan and place the pan directly on the stovetop burners. Scrape the pan drippings from the edges of the pan. Deglaze with red wine and veal reduction. Add the shallots and garlic. Season with salt and pepper. Spoon the pan drippings sauce over the bottom of a serving platter. Mound the spaetzle in the center of the sauce. Carve the loin and fan around the spaetzle. Garnish with parsley and Essence.
